mapper.select:
SELECT p.*, a.name as author_name, d.name as dynasty_name, t.name as tag_name FROM poem p LEFT JOIN author a ON p.author_id = a.id LEFT JOIN dynasty d ON p.dynasty_id = d.id LEFT JOIN tag t ON p.tag_id = t.id WHERE 1=1
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{author}, '%')
AND d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dynasty}, '%')
AND t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%')
LIMIT 50

SELECT p.*, a.name as author_name, d.name as dynasty_name, t.name as tag_name FROM poem p LEFT JOIN author a ON p.author_id = a.id LEFT JOIN dynasty d ON p.dynasty_id = d.id LEFT JOIN tag t ON p.tag_id = t.id WHERE p.title = #{title} LIMIT 1

SELECT p.*, a.name as author_name, d.name as dynasty_name, t.name as tag_name FROM poem p LEFT JOIN author a ON p.author_id = a.id LEFT JOIN dynasty d ON p.dynasty_id = d.id LEFT JOIN tag t ON p.tag_id = t.id

SELECT p.*, a.name as author_name, d.name as dynasty_name, t.name as tag_name FROM poem p LEFT JOIN author a ON p.author_id = a.id LEFT JOIN dynasty d ON p.dynasty_id = d.id LEFT JOIN tag t ON p.tag_id = t.id WHERE p.author_id = #{authorId}

SELECT p.*, a.name as author_name, d.name as dynasty_name, t.name as tag_name FROM poem p LEFT JOIN author a ON p.author_id = a.id LEFT JOIN dynasty d ON p.dynasty_id = d.id LEFT JOIN tag t ON p.tag_id = t.id WHERE p.dynasty_id = #{dynastyId}

SELECT p.*, a.name as author_name, d.name as dynasty_name, t.name as tag_name FROM poem p LEFT JOIN author a ON p.author_id = a.id LEFT JOIN dynasty d ON p.dynasty_id = d.id LEFT JOIN tag t ON p.tag_id = t.id WHERE p.tag_id = #{tagId}
